name: Symphony workflow orchestration
description: Loads WORKFLOW.md assets and optional Symphony orchestration examples as a runtime extension.

capabilities.description: Prepends selected WORKFLOW.md orchestration guidance before model inference.
Provides the extracted Symphony board model and example Agent Browser surface.

events.name: agent-harness.ext.symphony.before-llm-messages
events.description: Runs before LLM message preparation when the Symphony plugin is loaded.

assets.description: Former Agent Browser Symphony task-board surface.

permissions.reason: Reads selected WORKFLOW.md files and plugin-owned workspace assets.
